officials.name: E. D'A. Tibbits

officials.name: F. W. Griffith
officials.allowances: also receives 300l, rising by 25l per annum to 350l as Treasurer of Antigua

officials.name: H. L. Humphrys
officials.allowances: also receives 150l by 10l to 200l as Chief Clerk to Auditor-General

officials.position: Government Analytical and Agricultural Chemist and Superintendent of Agriculture

officials.position: Chief Justice of the Supreme Court and Keeper of the Records

officials.name: J. S. McDonald

officials.allowances: including 100l. from Montserrat, and 50l. transport allowance

officials.position: Surveyor of Roads and Officer in Charge of Wallings Water Works

officials.name: T. Fisher

officials.allowances: uniform, 3l., medical attendance, 1l., and quarters valued at 10l.

officials.allowances: 30l. in lieu of quarters, 30l. horse allowance, and 40l. as Military Instructor to Local Forces, Antigua.

officials.allowances: Receives a travelling allowance of 12/6 a day when visiting Montserrat.

officials.position: Magistrate and Coroner (Barbuda); Supplementary Magistrate, Antigua; Deputy Coroner

officials.name: C. Francis

officials.allowances: 150l. as superintendent of Crown Lands, horse allowance 30l.

officials.allowances: horse allowance 55l., and quarters; as Keeper of Powder Magazine, 5l.; and as Officer Instructor to Local Forces, 25l.

officials.position: Officer in Charge of Prison Discipline
